title: GROUP_LEAVE leave notification silently omits members beyond MAX_MEMBERS_PER_GROUP
description: GROUP_LEAVE fetches remaining_before via list_group_members, which has a LIMIT of MAX_MEMBERS_PER_GROUP (1000). If the group has more than 1000 members (cap is 100 per add_group_member_capped, so this cannot currently happen), members beyond 1000 never receive the leave notification. More importantly: the 1000 limit in list_group_members and the 100 cap in add_group_member_capped are separate constants, not linked. If the group cap is ever raised above 1000, the leave notification silently truncates with no error or warning. This is a latent coupling.
